q: Who can buy from the Alumni Store?
a: All IISc alumni, current students, faculty, and staff. Alumni get member pricing after signing in with their alumni email.
Currently we ship within India. International shipping for select items is planned for later this year.
Unused items in original packaging can be returned within 14 days of delivery. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5–7 business days.
Metro cities: 3–5 business days. Rest of India: 5–8 business days. You will receive tracking details by email once shipped.
You earn 1 point per ₹10 spent. 100 points equal ₹50 off a future order. Points appear in your profile within 24 hours of delivery.
All surplus from the Alumni Store funds student scholarships and campus heritage restoration projects.
